stemHtml: Regarding the thrust required and thrust available for a jet engine aircraft, which of the following statements is true? During the...

options.a: climb, the maximum angle is achieved when flying with the minimum thrust required.
options.b: cruise, the maximum speed is only limited by the thrust available.
options.c: cruise, the maximum range is achieved when flying with the minimum thrust required.
options.d: descent, the maximum range is achieved when flying at the maximum thrust required.
